/usr/bin/ar qc libfree.a "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/string.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/stdio.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/stdlib.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/ctype.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/errno.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/time.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/math.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/dirent.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/mman.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/arch/aarch64/crt.S.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/arch/aarch64/syscall.S.o" "CMakeFiles/free-libc.dir/src/libc/arch/aarch64/setjmp.S.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libfree.a
